flights.note: No origin city specified - flights not included in this itinerary. Traveler will need to arrange transportation to Austin, TX separately.

hotels.name: Hotel San José
hotels.location: Located directly on South Congress Avenue in the heart of SoCo district
hotels.pet_policy: Dogs allowed with $50 one-time pet fee (included in total)
hotels.notes: Iconic Austin boutique hotel with mid-century modern aesthetic, walking distance to restaurants, shops, and live music venues

activities.description: After checking in, take your pet for a walk down South Congress Avenue. Browse vintage shops like Uncommon Objects and Lucy in Disguise. Stop at Home Slice Pizza (pet-friendly patio) for lunch.
Head to Auditorium Shores off-leash dog park along Lady Bird Lake. Let your pet play while enjoying sunset views of downtown Austin skyline.
Visit the famous natural spring-fed pool in Zilker Park (pets not allowed in pool but can enjoy the surrounding park). Cool off in the 68-70°F water.
Pet-friendly patio dining at this vegetarian/vegan café near South Congress. Try their famous breakfast tacos and coffee.
Watch 1.5 million Mexican free-tailed bats emerge at sunset from under the Congress Avenue Bridge. Pet-friendly viewing from the bridge or Auditorium Shores.

activities.activity: Dinner at Perla's Seafood & Oyster Bar
activities.description: Enjoy fresh seafood on the pet-friendly patio of this SoCo favorite. Try the oysters and Gulf fish.
Take your pet to this off-leash dog park peninsula on Lady Bird Lake. Beautiful trails and swimming areas for dogs.

activities.activity: Brunch at Snooze an A.M. Eatery
activities.description: Popular brunch spot with creative pancakes and breakfast dishes. Pet-friendly patio available.
Free guided tour of the beautiful Texas State Capitol building (pets must remain outside, but grounds are pet-friendly for walking).
Austin institution serving Tex-Mex on South Congress since 1986. Large pet-friendly patio with live music.
Grab coffee and pastries at Jo's Coffee (famous 'I love you so much' mural) on South Congress before checking out. Pet-friendly outdoor seating.

input.reasoning: Successfully found a pet-friendly hotel (Hotel San José) that meets all specified requirements: located directly on South Congress Avenue, under $150/night at $145/night, features a pool and free parking, and welcomes pets. The 3-night stay from July 10-13, 2026 totals $435 including the pet fee. Since no origin city was provided, flights were not included. The itinerary focuses on pet-friendly activities around South Congress and Austin, taking advantage of the city's dog-friendly culture with off-leash parks, pet-friendly restaurant patios, and outdoor attractions. Total estimated cost is $645 including hotel and activities/dining.
input.final_message_to_user:
I've created a complete Austin itinerary for your pet-friendly stay! 

**Hotel San José** is perfect for your needs - it's an iconic boutique hotel located right on South Congress Avenue with a beautiful outdoor pool, free parking, and welcomes dogs. At $145/night (including pet fee), it's within your budget for 3 nights totaling $435.

Your itinerary includes Austin's best pet-friendly experiences:
- **Dog parks**: Auditorium Shores off-leash area and Red Bud Isle
- **Bat watching** at Congress Bridge (a must-see Austin experience!)
- **Pet-friendly dining** at local favorites like Home Slice Pizza, Guero's Taco Bar, and Perla's
- **South Congress shopping** and the famous Jo's Coffee mural
- **Outdoor activities** along Lady Bird Lake and Zilker Park

**Total Cost: $645** (hotel + activities/meals)

*Note: Since you didn't specify an origin city, flights aren't included. You'll need to arrange transportation to Austin separately.*

Austin is one of the most dog-friendly cities in the US, so you and your pet will have an amazing time exploring SoCo and beyond!
